CONTENT.Career: Mishpati started to play football for Hapoel Rishon LeZion.In summer 2011 signed for the Israeli Premier League club F.C. Ashdod as the second goalkeeper for Ofir Marciano. In 2015–16 season Mishpati became the first goalkeeper after Ashdod relegated to Liga Leumit in the previous season. In 2017 loaned to Hapoel Rishon LeZion.On 31 August 2021 signed for two seasons for Maccabi Haifa.
CONTENT.External links: Roi Mishpati at SoccerwayRoi Mishpati – Israel Football Association league player details

SUMMARY: Roi Mishpati (born 23 December 1992) is an Israeli footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Maccabi Tel Aviv.
